sitting_intro.text: Welcome. Sit in a stable and comfortable posture.
Let the body be upright, relaxed, and at ease.
Allow the breath to be natural. No forcing. No controlling.
Feel one clear touch point of the breath, usually at the nostrils or upper lip.
When the mind wanders, gently return to direct sensation. Again and again.

walking_intro.text: Stand still for a moment and feel both feet on the ground.
Walk slowly on a short path, with eyes softly open for balance.
Feel lifting, moving, and placing. Simple direct knowing.
At the end of the path, pause, turn mindfully, and continue.
Now continue in silence, with steady awareness of each step.

reminders.text: Soften the body, and stay present.
Feel the feet meeting the ground.

closing.text: Session complete. May all beings be happy and secure.
